malefic aspects thereby causing a very strong Arista. The
Lagna-lord afflicted by malefic conjunction is in the 7th house.
Saturn being in the Amsa of Venus is aspected by him. This is a
part of one of the conditions mentioned by Mrkap^u for early
death. If you take Candra-lagna, there is the. powerful malefic
in the 8th house. And it was in the Dasa of this planet that
both birth and death took place. The child could not survive

SPAN OF LIFE 73
even the Bhukd of Sani. Now look at the star occupied by
Sani. It is Citra—III which happens to be the Vadhatara, 7th
from the natal one. The lord of Candra-lagna is conjoined
with the lord of the 8th (who is aspected by Saturn—which is
an Alpayuryoga) and another malefic.
Case IV. Female born at 9-30 P.M. on 4-8-1952, died at
3 P.M. on 16-9-1952. Balance of Sun's Dasa was 3 yrs. 4 m. 6 d.
Explanation According to Sage Garga the presence of the
Moon in the 11th for the night-birth should ward off a crore
